input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.7.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.7.2.4
            TITLE: fibrous/absorbent material, (such as header wrap), must not be used on the outside of an

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.7.2.4: Fibrous/absorbent material, (such as header wrap), must not be used on the outside of an
IC.7.2.4 Fibrous/absorbent material, (such as header wrap), must not be used on the outside of an 
exhaust manifold or exhaust system.

final_answer: Fibrous/absorbent material, (such as header wrap), must not be used on the outside of an exhaust manifold or exhaust system.
